bird.summary: The Vilcabamba thistletail (Asthenes vilcabambae) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It…

locations.name: 灌木林
locations.summary: 灌木林与矮树林是一类特殊生物群系，其密度较灌丛高，高度较疏林矮。由于产生条件苛刻，灌木林只成片分布于两类地区。木干较灌木粗壮的可称为矮树林。 高山常绿阔叶云林 这种常绿阔叶亚型主要分布于菲律宾、苏门答腊等岛屿及中南美洲的安第斯山，常常位于…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Vilcabamba thistletail
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits elfin forest and Polylepis woodlands in the tree line ecotone

relations.subject: Vilcabamba thistletail
relations.evidence: It is found in lesser numbers in the higher páramo grassland and lower cloudforest

relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Vilcabamba thistletail
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is apparently "quite common in appropriate habitat" and "[l]arge portions of [its] range are in areas currently inaccessible to human disturbance." Much of the range is within Otishi National Park
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
